mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USERS (USER_ID, LEVEL_ID, AVATAR_ID, NICKNAME, PASSWORD, REG_DATE, EXP, IS_DELETE, GENDER) VALUES (#{userId}, #{levelId}, #{avatarId}, #{nickname}, #{password}, NOW(), #{exp}, #{delete}, #{gender})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_DELETE = 0
SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_DELETE = 0
SELECT * FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{googleId} AND IS_DELETE = 0
SELECT LEVEL_ID AS levelId, REQ_EXP AS reqExp, LEVEL_ICON AS levelIcon FROM LEVEL_ICON WHERE LEVEL_ID = #{value}
SELECT AVATAR_ID AS avatarId, AVATAR_IMG AS avatarImg, REQ_LEVEL AS reqLevel FROM AVATAR ORDER BY AVATAR_ID
